description: This is a fun, bright choice from catwalk to suit the summer weather! These sandals bring a fashionably new look to a gladiator style and will look great with colourful outfits.  Wear them with denim capris, a multi-coloured top and chunky plastic jewellery.UpperElasticated cross-over straps around foot and ankle for a snug FitSynthetic patent leather back reaching above the ankle with a zip for ease of useTextile covered footbed for absolute comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with texture for gripFloral lug at heelshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
